events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess hazard: shims missing under base plate during column/beam erection & plumb. Need identify safety hazards, severity, immediate controls. Decision fail because dangerous/non-compliant? Missing shims under base plate means column base not properly supported/level, load transfer compromised, potential for column settlement/instability, non-compliant with AISC 303 (base plates must be level and supported, shims used to level and transfer loads). OSHA 1926 Subpart R requires columns erected and braced, stable. In-progress. Component condition installed-defective, non-compliant. Risk high? Could lead to structural collapse or instability. Immediate controls: stop work, do not load/attach beams until base plates properly shimmed/level, install shims per submittal/AISC, re-plumb, inspect, secure bracing. Need JSON with fields. percent_complete maybe 40? value 0. sound_source etc default empty string/list? Schema says sound_source string, event_time number, rate number, order array, workable array. Use empty string, 0.0, [] if not applicable. confidence high 0.95. references AISC 303, OSHA 1926 Subpart R. findings: "Shims missing under column base plate; base plate not bearing uniformly on foundation." "Column may be out-of-plumb/level and unstable under load." actions: "Stop work in affected area." "Install approved shims under base plate per AISC 303 and approved submittals to achieve full bearing and level." "Re-plumb and re-check column alignment." "Have competent person/inspector verify before releasing for next operation." rationale: Missing shims create point loading/instability, non-compliant with AISC and OSHA, risk of settlement/collapse. decision fail. risk high. work_stage in-progress. percent_complete maybe 35. value 0. component_conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Need ensure JSON valid.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "in-progress",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 35,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Shims are missing under the column base plate, resulting in non-uniform bearing on the foundation.",
    "Column may be out-of-level/plumb and unstable before beams and bracing are fully connected.",
    "Load path from column to foundation is compromised, risking settlement or sudden displacement."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work on the affected column/beam erection until the deficiency is corrected.",
    "Install approved shims under the base plate per the approved submittals and AISC 303 to achieve full, level bearing.",
    "Re-plumb and re-check the column alignment and elevation after shimming.",
    "Have a competent person or inspector verify the base plate bearing, shim placement, and plumb before releasing the work for the next operation."
  ],
  "rationale": "Missing base-plate shims create an installed-defective, non-compliant condition that prevents proper load transfer and can lead to column instability or settlement during erection. AISC 303 requires base plates to be level and properly supported, and OSHA 1926 Subpart R requires columns to be erected and braced in a stable condition, so the work must fail until corrected.",
  "references": ["AISC 303", "OSHA 1926 Subpart R"]
}
